name: Easy Harvest Drumsticks
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Potatoes, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow 2-3 quart microwave-safe dish, arrange bacon between sheets of paper towel.
2. Microwave at high (100%) for 4 minutes, or until crisp. Remove bacon, drain on paper towels, and set aside for garnishing.
3. Arrange onions and potatoes over the bottom of the dish; cover with plastic wrap and microwave at high for 8 minutes.
4. Stir well. Arrange drumsticks, with meatier portions towards the outside, on top of the vegetables.
5. Add remaining ingredients except salt and parsley. Cover with wax paper and microwave at high for 5 minutes.
6. Microwave at medium-high (70%) power for 14 minutes per pound of drumsticks, stirring several times.
7. Let stand 15 minutes and check for doneness; juices should run clear when pierced with a fork.
8. Add salt to taste. To serve, garnish with crumbled bacon and parsley.
